summary: The session focused on how educators can leverage assessment data to inform instructional strategies that support student growth. The user sought specific assessment tools, professional development resources, and free resources for teachers to enhance their understanding and application of assessment data in teaching practices.
facts: The user is interested in leveraging assessment data to inform instructional strategies in education. The user requested specific assessment tools and techniques for gathering relevant data. The user asked for recommendations on professional development opportunities for educators to learn about using assessment data effectively. The user inquired about free resources for teachers who may not have a budget for professional development. The National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) offers webinars and workshops on assessment data literacy. The National Council of Teachers of Mathematics (NCTM) provides professional development focused on using assessment data in mathematics. The American Federation of Teachers (AFT) offers free professional development resources, including webinars and articles. Edutopia provides free articles, videos, and resources on using assessment data to inform instruction. The Teaching Channel offers free videos of real teachers using assessment data to guide their instructional decisions. The user is seeking to improve instructional strategies to better meet student needs through data-driven decisions.
